description: Release the PDS-held vault share to the authenticated user after identity verification.

main.description: Releases the vault share (Share 2) to the authenticated user. Requires recent identity verification or a verificationToken.

share.description: The decrypted vault share (hex-encoded Shamir share).

errors.name: VerificationRequired
errors.description: Identity verification required before share release.

errors.name: ShareNotFound
errors.description: No vault share found for this account.
